title: BenBow Bucket with Lid, 30l, Brown, 1 x 30 Litres - Food-safe stable airtight leak-proof odourless - plastic storage container with metal handle - crack-resistant handle - empty - perfect for home
features: AGAINST DRYING OUT OR MOISTURE - this 30 litre bucket is for storing products that should not dry out. The airtight lid, which keeps the contents fresh for a long time, prevents the stored goods from losing their properties. Of course, this also works the other way round: goods that need to be protected from moisture can be stored tightly in the bucket.

WIDE APPLICATION - this plastic bucket (fermentation bucket) holds 30 litres of liquids (e.g. water, oils, sauces, beer), wet products, dry products (chicken feed, flour, salt, grain), solid products. When the lid is closed, the 30 litre bucket is leak-proof, airtight, temperature-stable and opaque.

SAFE MATERIAL - large plastic bucket is made of food-safe polypropylene (PP) and can be used in any commercial kitchen, for brewing beer at home or in agriculture. The water bucket can also be used for changing water in an aquarium or for storing fish when fishing. The Hobbock is BRC-certified (according to the certification standard for food safety). The 30 litre bucket and lid are fully recyclable.

USE INSTRUCTIONS - The plastic bucket is equipped with a lid and metal handle. The storage container with lid can be stored in the refrigerator, freezer (down to -20 degrees Celsius) or filled with hot contents (up to 100 degrees). TIP: Do not pull the lid forcibly in one place. It is best to lift it a little and run your fingers along the circumference. This prevents damage to the lid.

DETAILS - Dimensions of the 30-litre bucket: Height with lid: 38.8 cm, base diameter: 32 cm, lid diameter: 36.3 cm, nominal capacity: 33 litres, capacity up to the rim: 34.5 L, empty weight 1160 g (bucket with lid). Melting point: 120 - 200 degrees Celsius.

Yes, the BENBOW bucket is suitable for food storage and features an airtight lid to maintain the freshness and quality of the food. It is also safe for contact with food. Can I use the BenBow bucket to transport liquids? Yes, the BenBow bucket is leak-proof and can be used to transport liquids. The lid closes tightly and the bucket is airtight. However, please note the capacity and transport it safely. Can the BenBow bucket be used outdoors? Yes, the BenBow bucket can be used outdoors. It is robust and leak-proof, making it suitable for camping, gardening. Please note that direct sunlight may affect the durability of the bucket. What kind of products can I store in this 30 litre bucket? The bucket is suitable for a variety of products, including wet, dry and solid foods as well as cleaning products, garden tools and much more.
